IDEA LAB

Innovation Excellence

About IDEA Lab

A dedicated innovation space where students transform ideas into impactful solutions through experimentation and mentorship.

Explore

01

Identify real-world problems and promising ideas through research and discovery.

Build

02

Design and prototype using IDEA Lab resources, tools, and cutting-edge technology.

Validate

03

Test, iterate, and refine solutions with expert mentorship and feedback.

Impact

04

Create solutions that generate real-world value and make a difference.

Live Event Feed

The Live Deck

Real-time access to workshops and innovation sessions.

Innovation Portal

Have a
Solid
Idea?

The IDEA Lab provides the infrastructure to turn concepts into reality. Access mentorship and high-end hardware.

Submissions are currently Open
for the next cohort

Ready to Launch?

Submit your proposal for technical review by our lab coordinators.

Incubation Office

Incubation &
Fabrication Support

Open to FISAT students and industry partners. Leverage our ecosystem for prototyping, 3D printing, and product development.

Protocol: LAB-ACCESS-01

Lab Slot
Reservation

To maintain industrial discipline and equipment integrity, all users must secure a confirmed window through the reservation portal.

Mandatory Access Control

Slot reservation is required for all FISAT students before entry.

Approved Timeframes

Access is granted strictly during your confirmed reservation window.

Asset Accountability

Users are responsible for equipment maintenance during their slot.

Secure Time Slot

Scan to Authenticate
